description_long: This is a dark green sectional sofa with a classic Chesterfield-inspired design, featuring deep button tufting along the backrest and arms. The sofa has a right-facing chaise extension, providing ample lounging space and a luxurious, inviting appearance. The armrests are rolled and generously padded, matching the height of the backrest and contributing to the traditional aesthetic. The seat cushions are thick and plush, with a uniform, seamless look, while the backrest is adorned with tufted detailing and includes a few loose accent pillows. The legs are not visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden support structure. The upholstery appears to be a smooth, matte fabric, giving the sofa a refined and comfortable finish suitable for upscale urban environments.
description: A dark green, tufted sectional sofa with a right-facing chaise and rolled armrests, upholstered in smooth fabric. The design is classic and plush, with a low-profile base and accent pillows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the sofa, the tufted backrest, rolled armrests, and the right-facing chaise extension.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, tufted backrest and the uniform height of the armrests and back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the length of the main seating area and the rolled armrest profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One long seat cushion for the main section, a single cushion for the chaise, and a continuous tufted backrest with a few loose accent pillows; all cushions appear attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present, rolled, and padded, matching the height of the backrest with a classic Chesterfield profile and deep tufting.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base design, likely block-style supports placed at the corners and possibly central points for stability.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, high backrest with deep button tufting, matching the armrest height and providing a plush, traditional look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark green fabric with a tufted texture on the backrest and arms, smooth seat cushions, and no visible decorative stitching or patterned detailing.
